_comment: Evergreen day 5 — Reference re Secession of Quebec.
matchSubstring: No Canadian province can secede unilaterally
text:
No Canadian province can secede unilaterally.

But a clear majority on a clear question imposes a constitutional duty on the rest of Canada to negotiate — with the feds, the other provinces, and Indigenous nations.

1998 SCC. Still governs Alberta 2026.
